Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules describes a loan application process with a fixed sequence and conditional branching Part 2 Desiderata describes timing constraints and optional activities Event Log 3 cases with timestamps and activities Task 1 Identify cases violating normative rules and explain why 2 Identify cases failing desiderata conditions 3 Suggest interpretations or justifications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Normative Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Documentation before Close Case If Rejected do not finalize documentation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze Event Log against Normative Rules Case 1 App Received 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision Approved 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Documentation 1330 Close Case 1400 Sequence matches exactly All good Case 2 App Received 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision Rejected 0930 Finalize Documentation 1000 Close Case 1030 Violation 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check Violation 2 Finalize Documentation after Rejected Case 3 Sequence matches exactly All normative rules met Conclusion for Task 1 Only Case 2 violates normative rules

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Desiderata Recommended Credit Check within 24h Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Encouraged Followup Call before closing Check Event Log against Desiderata Case 1 Credit Check 30 mins Loan Decision to Inform 2 hours good Case 2 Credit Check 1 hour but Inform Applicant Not in log jumps from Loan Decision to Finalize Documentation misses Inform Applicant normative violation Case 3 Credit Check 49 hours over 24h Inform Applicant 51 hours over 48h No Followup Call Conclusion for Task 2 Case 3 fails desiderata Case 1 and 2 meet timing but miss followup

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrection Refinement during drafting Check Case 2 Inform Applicant is completely missing normative rule Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision So Case 2 has three normative violations 1 Risk Assessment before Credit Check 2 Missing Inform Applicant skipping a step 3 Finalize Documentation after Rejection must explicitly state this Check Desiderata Followup Call missing across cases but highlight Case 3 Timing Calculations Case 3 Credit Check 49 hours Inform 51 hours accurate

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 3 Interpretations Justifications Case 2 Risk Assessment before Credit Check system glitch parallel processing error manual override Finalize Documentation after Rejection administrative error misclassification Missing Inform Applicant logging omission process shortcut Case 3 Delayed Credit Check Inform Applicant high workload resource constraints applicant unavailability Missing Followup Call staffing shortage automated process General process mining scenarios logging errors parallel tasks resource bottlenecks

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure the Response Follow the 3 tasks explicitly Use clear headings bullet points Reference specific timestamps Distinguish normative and desiderata SelfCorrection Verification Check Case 2 violation 2 missing Inform Applicant skip violation Case 3 timing good Justifications grounded in BPM event log realities Everything is solid Ready to generate response
